hero.tagline: Plan, execute, and lead blockchain projects — bridging technical complexity and business outcomes.

section1.title: Introduction to Blockchain Project Management
section1.description: What makes blockchain projects unique, the project lifecycle, key roles, and the Agile vs Waterfall debate for decentralized teams.

section2.title: Project Planning & Scoping for Blockchain
section2.description: Decision frameworks, scope definition, stakeholder mapping, work breakdown structures, and governance models.

section3.title: Risk Management in Blockchain Projects
section3.description: Technical, regulatory, and adoption risks — with assessment frameworks, smart contract audit processes, and mitigation strategies.

section4.title: Communication & Collaboration for Blockchain Teams
section4.description: Multi-stakeholder communication, translating technical to business, documentation practices, and decentralized governance.

section5.title: Leading Blockchain Project Teams
section5.description: Team composition, leadership in decentralized contexts, Agile ceremonies, change management, and measuring project success.

conclusion.title: Conclusion
conclusion.description: The blockchain PM is not just a project manager — they are the translator between the technical and the human.

instructor.title: Meet the Instructor
instructor.subtitle: The person behind this course
instructor.name: Pedro Granate
highlights: MSc in Mechanical Engineering from IST (Instituto Superior Técnico)
Project Manager in production & development roles
Co-founder, COO & CPO at Zharta — product and operational strategy
